dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4043 IS: Health Care for Homeless Veterans Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Banks (for himself and Ms. Duckworth) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to make permanent the authority of the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to provide treatment and rehabilitation for seriously mentally ill and homeless veterans, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Health Care for Homeless Veterans Act.

section.header: Permanent authority for treatment and rehabilitation for seriously mentally ill and homeless veterans
section.text: Section 2031 of title 38, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking (a) In providing and inserting In providing; and
